reason: Global TianChen-RV authority chain, RVV-first stage order, and descriptor/source-front-door prohibitions.

summary: Inspected production computed-mask standalone reduce-add route and confirmed the existing typed selected body, provider route, target artifact bundle, generated ABI harness, and ssh rvv path already supported the bounded executable route. Implemented focused evidence closure: route/header FileCheck now pins provider-derived tcrv_rvv.reduction_kind=add, target artifact C++ negative coverage rejects stale reduction_kind mirrors, and testing spec now defines computed-mask standalone reduction generated-bundle evidence requirements.

production_path_result: No production source route change was needed; existing provider/materializer/harness path was sufficient after focused proof gaps were closed.
